nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 基伍湖
nodes.summary: 基伍湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Albertine owlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 卡胡兹-别加国家公园
nodes.summary: 卡胡兹-别加国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Albertine owlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
nodes.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Alexandre Prigogine
nodes.summary: Alexandre Prigogine是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Albertine owlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Albertine owlet
nodes.summary: Albertine owlet（Albertine owlet，学名 Glaucidium albertinum），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、猎捕压力。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Glaucidium albertinum |article-number=e.T22689310A208604278 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22689310A208604278.en}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | taxon = Glaucidium albertinum | authority = Prigogine, 1983 | synonyms = }} The Albertine owlet (Glaucidium albertinum) or Prigogine's owlet, is a small species of small owl in the family Strigidae, native to the Albertine Rift montane forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Glaucidium albertinum |article-number=e.T22689310A208604278 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22689310A208604278.en}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | taxon = Glaucidium albertinum | authority = Prigogine, 1983 | synonyms = }} The Albertine owlet (Glaucidium albertinum) or Prigogine's owlet, is a small species of small owl in the family Strigidae, native to the Albertine Rift montane forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There has also been a sight record from Kahuzi-Biéga National Park, west of Lake Kivu in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The Albertine owlet occurs in very open montane forest and its ecotone where there are many clearings and a dense undergrowth

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There has also been a sight record from Kahuzi-Biéga National Park, west of Lake Kivu in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The Albertine owlet occurs in very open montane forest and its ecotone where there are many clearings and a dense undergrowth

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: There has also been a sight record from Kahuzi-Biéga National Park, west of Lake Kivu in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The Albertine owlet occurs in very open montane forest and its ecotone where there are many clearings and a dense undergrowth

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Deforestation and forest degradation are the most likely threats within the range of the Albertine owlet

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The forest in the Itombwe Mountains and Kahuzi-Biéga National Park is under increasing pressure from agricultural clearance and grazing, timber cutting, mining and hunting
